governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain medical/legal alignment of core efficacy claims.
rules.rule_text: The primary campaign headline and product benefit statements must adhere verbatim to the approved framework, stating LISRAYA is the first targeted treatment and blocks specific inflammatory signals that drive DM.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.
LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rules.intent: Ensure accurate and non-misleading MOA and administration claims.
rules.rule_text: Any explanation of LISRAYA's mechanism of action (MOA) or administration must utilize the approved messaging: either targeting the root cause instead of general suppression, turning off 'on' inflammatory switches, or highlighting the once-daily pill convenience.

quotes: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

governance.preferred_form: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

quotes: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

rules.intent: Standardize doctor conversation triggers with medically and legally vetted wording.
rules.rule_text: Doctor-discussion CTA features must carry the verbatim pattern: 'Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.'

rules.intent: Maintain accurate and consistent brand name usage for the patient support initiative.
rules.rule_text: The patient support program must always be referenced by its official name, 'My Compass Support'.
